quantlab.name: Quant Lab System v4.0 Daily Report
quantlab.pipeline_error: Advance canonical raw part files first, then rebuild snapshot/feature-store/report so a fresh render timestamp cannot mask stale QuantLab data.

breakout_v2.name: Breakout V2
breakout_v2.stale_reason: Best-setups snapshot depends on data as-of 2026-04-17
breakout_v2.freshness_reason: Best-setups snapshot depends on data as-of 2026-04-17
breakout_v2.metric_na_reason: Breakout V2 has no standalone historical accuracy metric; evaluate via snapshot throughput and gate outcomes.

hist_probs.name: Historical Probabilities
hist_probs.metric_na_reason: Passive source; use regime date, freshness, and coverage instead of accuracy.

pipeline_diagnostic.explanation: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.

recommendations.text: Scientific Analyzer v9.1: data 7 days behind. Check ingest pipeline.
Quant Lab System v4.0 Daily Report: accuracy below coin-flip (0.0%). Recalibration recommended.

status_detail: Data freshness report shows stale families

primary_actions.title: Data freshness report shows stale families
primary_actions.why: Prioritized fundamentals scope: fresh=81, stale=0, missing=1189.
primary_actions.action: Rebuild the freshness report after upstream market, hist-probs, and fundamentals artifacts are current.

primary_actions.title: Final seal is blocking release
primary_actions.action: Clear the blocking reasons upstream, then rebuild the final integrity seal from the same target-date artifact chain.

primary_actions.title: Automation refresh chain is degraded
primary_actions.impact: Automation can report failure even when some artifacts recovered, so operators need explicit cause-vs-recovery visibility.
primary_actions.action: Use the latest successful artifact and latest failed automation step together; only treat unrecovered failures as active blockers.

dependency_health.reason: Provider-backed v7 history refresh is the first upstream market-data hop.
Q1 delta ingest can only advance after v7 history refresh touches newer packs.
QuantLab daily report reads raw-bar freshness from the Q1 ingest layer.
Hist-probs/regime computation requires the same raw market bars to advance.
Scientific summary is sourced from stock-analysis snapshots rather than QuantLab raw bars.
Forecast batch is independent from QuantLab raw-bar freshness.
Learning report aggregates forecast/scientific/elliott source artifacts.
Breakout/snapshot combines forecast freshness with QuantLab publish layers.
The universe-wide analyze-v4 audit is only trustworthy after the direct data/model inputs and snapshot layer are current.
ETF diagnostic explains the current snapshot funnel output.
V1 audit requires current learning artifacts and snapshot outputs.
Cutover readiness is evaluated after the V1 audit is available.
System status summarizes the current artifact/control-plane state after the direct audit artifacts exist.
Freshness report derives expected market date and family health from upstream market/history artifacts.
Epoch is the coherence view across status and pipeline outputs for the same target date.
UI truth should run only after the artifact chain has a coherent target date.
Final seal consumes the coherent epoch plus UI truth result.
Deploy bundle is only valid after the seal is ready.
Wrangler deploy is the final downstream publish step.

market_data_refresh.label: Market Data Refresh
market_data_refresh.why: Latest v7 history refresh report was generated at 2026-04-18T08:02:30Z with observed market data only up to 2026-04-17.
market_data_refresh.next_fix: Run the provider-backed history refresh first; if it does not advance, inspect provider auth/quota and refresh report outputs before touching downstream jobs.

status_detail.impact: No newer market history can flow into delta ingest, QuantLab raw bars, hist-probs, or the snapshot dependency chain.

failure_signals: output_asof missing or older than the latest trading day
assets_fetched_with_data = 0 with output_asof null (pre-market run or quota exhaustion — re-run after market close)
runbook.lessons_learned: Runs during market hours return partial data (EODHD day not yet closed). Schedule at ≥23:00 ET. assets_fetched_with_data=0 before market close is normal — not an error. API_LIMIT_REACHED.lock.json means quota exhausted; wait for reset or swap API key.

q1_delta_ingest.label: Q1 Delta Ingest
q1_delta_ingest.why: Latest successful Q1 delta ingest is anchored to ingest_date=2026-04-17 and was updated at 2026-04-18T14:34:06Z.
q1_delta_ingest.next_fix: Rerun the Q1 delta ingest against the active target_market_date, then verify latest_success.json records ingest_date, selected_packs_total, noop_no_changed_packs, and a downstream QuantLab rebuild before rebuilding snapshot/UI layers.

status_detail.impact: QuantLab raw-bar freshness cannot advance until the delta ingest layer has incorporated newer market history.

runbook.lessons_learned: Noop detection is intentional — if no packs changed, ingest skips and downstream QuantLab continues on the same partitions. Only re-run if upstream refresh has actually advanced. evidence_complete=false means the artifact is incomplete and cannot be trusted for release decisions.

quantlab_daily_report.label: QuantLab Daily Report
quantlab_daily_report.next_fix: Advance canonical raw part files first, then rebuild snapshot/feature-store/report so a fresh render timestamp cannot mask stale QuantLab data.

status_detail.impact: QuantLab canonical data is within expected label window (lag=0T ≤ 20T).

failure_signals: raw canonical or publish as-of lags current market
runbook.lessons_learned: latestCanonicalRequiredDataDate lags latestAnyRequiredDataDate by the ML label window — structural, not a bug. Only excess lag beyond the window is a violation. Report freshness reflects publish asof, not raw-bar asof. latestCanonicalRequiredDataDate was 33 days stale (2026-03-11) due to missing auto-update — monitor this field.

hist_probs.label: Historical Probabilities
hist_probs.why: US+EU historical profile freshness is 28041/28041 fresh, 0 stale, 0 missing; latest run asset classes=ETF,STOCK.
hist_probs.next_fix: Run the full historical-profile builder over the registry-backed stock+ETF universe, then verify run-summary coverage and regime date advance together.

status_detail.impact: Historical probability context is current for the required US+EU universe.

failure_signals: run-summary processed count below universe target
ETF tickers not included in asset_classes
runbook.lessons_learned: 45–90 min for full 42k universe. Always include --asset-classes STOCK,ETF — ETFs are silently omitted if flag is missing. INACTIVE_TOLERANCE=20 trading days (was 5, now fixed). Write-verification added after each file write. fresh_skipped checkpoint enables crash recovery and idempotency. 16,755 assets (39.7%) were stale as of 2026-04-10 — run catch-up before marking release ready.

forecast_daily.label: Forecast Daily
forecast_daily.why: Forecast latest artifact was generated at 2026-04-17T20:15:46.194Z with as-of 2026-04-17.
forecast_daily.next_fix: Use scripts/forecast/run_daily.mjs as the primary batch health check and treat engine-level files as implementation detail unless run_daily fails.

status_detail.impact: Forecast freshness drives learning and the snapshot stack, but current forecast artifacts are healthy.

runbook.lessons_learned: Silent quality degradation when quantlab_daily_report is stale. Always verify data_asof alignment between forecast output and quantlab canonical date before treating forecast as fresh. A data_asof gap > 2 trading days indicates an upstream stale source, not a forecast engine bug.

scientific_summary.label: Scientific Summary
scientific_summary.next_fix: Refresh the scientific summary and verify the upstream source emits a current timestamp before the daily learning batch runs.

status_detail.impact: Scientific rows remain available, but they are not current enough to be treated as live input.

failure_signals: no signals and no source timestamp
runbook.lessons_learned: source_meta.asof must equal or exceed the QuantLab canonical date. An empty signals array with a fresh asof is valid (regime with no strong setups). An empty signals array with a stale asof means upstream ingest has not advanced.

learning_daily.label: Daily Learning Report
learning_daily.why: Learning report generated 2026-04-19T07:05:49.445Z with status VERBESSERUNG ✅.
learning_daily.next_fix: Regenerate the daily learning report after forecast/scientific artifacts are current enough to support it.

status_detail.impact: The learning report drives readiness and audit interpretation across the dashboard.

runbook.lessons_learned: Learning cycle is a downstream observer of forecast and scientific summary — it will not advance if either source is stale. safety_switch escalation is intentional when model accuracy drops; do not manually override. overall_status=DEGRADED with safety_switch=ACTIVE means the system is protecting live signal quality.

snapshot.label: Best Setups Snapshot
snapshot.next_fix: Keep snapshot generation tied to explicit upstream freshness checks so QuantLab staleness cannot hide behind a fresh render timestamp.

status_detail.impact: Snapshot rows currently render, but part of the dependency chain still lags.

runbook.lessons_learned: rows_emitted.total=0 almost always means quantlab_asof lags data_asof by more than the tolerated window. ETF count drops silently when ETF hist-probs run was omitted. diagnose-best-setups-etf-drop.mjs is the diagnostic tool — run it before re-running build-best-setups-v4. CRITICAL: Snapshot must run AFTER hist-probs is fresh. Assets with minimum_n_not_met=true and stale hist-probs are now gated out of BUY lists at row level.

stock_analyzer_universe_audit.label: Stock Analyzer Universe Audit
stock_analyzer_universe_audit.summary: Stock Analyzer universe audit found critical field-level failures
stock_analyzer_universe_audit.why: Latest audit processed 41785/41785 assets and found 1 failure families (0 critical, 1 warning) affecting 1189 assets.

failure_families.label: Fundamentals artifact missing
failure_families.description: The fundamentals artifact is missing for a stock asset that should expose fundamentals in the UI.

warning_failure_families.label: Fundamentals artifact missing
warning_failure_families.description: The fundamentals artifact is missing for a stock asset that should expose fundamentals in the UI.

status_detail.impact: This is the only universe-wide proof that analyze-v4 renders all required UI contracts correctly across stocks and ETFs.

runbook.lessons_learned: Full audit (--max-tickers 0) takes 60-90 min for 42k assets. artifact_only mode runs without wrangler and is the default for automated pipelines. artifact_hist_probs_stale is the most common critical family; run hist-probs catch-up first. sampled_mode=true means the audit result can never qualify as release_eligible.

etf_diagnostic.label: ETF Diagnostic
etf_diagnostic.why: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.
etf_diagnostic.next_fix: If ETF snapshot output drops to zero again, inspect diagnostic rejection breakdown before changing gates.

diagnosis.explanation: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.

status_detail.impact: ETF diagnostic validates whether the current snapshot funnel is emitting final ETF rows.

failure_signals: diagnosis code indicates rejection funnel collapse
runbook.lessons_learned: ETF count in best-setups-v4 can silently drop to zero if hist-probs was run without --asset-classes STOCK,ETF. Runs fast (< 30 sec) and can be run standalone. diagnosis_code=ETF_HIST_PROBS_MISSING means ETF hist-probs artifact is absent.

v1_audit.label: V1 Audit
v1_audit.next_fix: Keep the audit path wired to current snapshot and learning artifacts so readiness decisions stay evidence-backed.

status_detail.impact: V1 audit supports cutover decisions and evidence-quality reporting.

runbook.lessons_learned: V1 signals mature 5 trading days after entry. signals_today=0 with matured_signals>0 is normal (no new entries today). Persistent matured_signals=0 over multiple days indicates the signal generation pipeline has stalled upstream.

cutover_readiness.label: Cutover Readiness
cutover_readiness.next_fix: Do not override governance. Improve readiness by reducing fallback usage and clearing upstream freshness blockers.

status_detail.impact: Cutover should remain blocked until fallback-rate and readiness criteria are genuinely satisfied.

runbook.lessons_learned: Cutover is gated on 7 consecutive days of legacy_shadow_write_total=0 and legacy_artifact_read_total=0 in the production context. criteria_failed items are authoritative — do not mark cutover ready manually.

system_status_report.label: System Status Report
system_status_report.why: This report itself is the observer summary layer for the active control plane.
system_status_report.next_fix: Rebuild the status report after upstream artifacts are refreshed.

runbook.lessons_learned: System status is an observer, not the release authority. It should explain the current control-plane state, never invent it. Rebuild it only after the upstream artifacts for the same target market date exist.

data_freshness_report.label: Data Freshness Report
data_freshness_report.summary: Data freshness report shows stale families
data_freshness_report.why: Prioritized fundamentals scope: fresh=81, stale=0, missing=1189.
data_freshness_report.next_fix: Rebuild the freshness report after upstream market, hist-probs, and fundamentals artifacts are current.

failure_signals: fundamentals_scope stale_count or missing_count > 0 for prioritized assets
runbook.lessons_learned: Fundamentals freshness is tracked only for the prioritized scope and is warning-only by policy. Hist-probs and market-history remain blocking; fundamentals do not.

pipeline_epoch.label: Pipeline Epoch
pipeline_epoch.next_fix: Rebuild epoch only after system status/runtime artifacts share the same target market date and module run IDs are populated.

runbook.lessons_learned: A fresh epoch without module run_ids is not a valid control-plane success. It is only a timestamped shell. Module coherence matters more than file recency.

runtime_preflight.label: Runtime Preflight
runtime_preflight.next_fix: Stabilize the local/NAS Pages runtime first, then rerun publish and UI truth from the same target-date chain.

summary.message: Diagnostic snapshot is not available yet
Diagnostic snapshot is not available yet

ui_field_truth_report.label: UI Field Truth Report
ui_field_truth_report.next_fix: Start the local runtime, rebuild the UI field truth report, and verify that only critical endpoints influence ui_field_truth_ok.

runbook.lessons_learned: Fundamentals is optional in UI truth. A fundamentals miss should be advisory only. If wrangler is offline, that is a runtime/readiness problem, not a field-truth defect in the artifacts themselves.

final_integrity_seal.label: Final Integrity Seal
final_integrity_seal.next_fix: Clear the blocking reasons upstream, then rebuild the final integrity seal from the same target-date artifact chain.

runbook.lessons_learned: Final seal is the only release SSOT. NAS reachability is advisory by default; fundamentals are non-blocking by policy. If the seal disagrees with observers, trust the seal and rebuild the observers from the same run.

build_deploy_bundle.label: Build Deploy Bundle
build_deploy_bundle.next_fix: Regenerate the deploy bundle after the final seal is green.

failure_signals: bundle target market date mismatches seal
runbook.lessons_learned: Bundle generation is downstream of the seal. If this step is red while the seal is green, treat it as publish-path drift, not a data-plane failure.

wrangler_deploy.label: Wrangler Deploy
wrangler_deploy.summary: Deploy proof missing or not release-ready
wrangler_deploy.next_fix: Run the release gate and publish step after the bundle is prepared.

failure_signals: release gate rejects dirty tree or invalid seal
runbook.lessons_learned: Deploy is the last mile, not the authority. The release gate must only accept a valid final seal and a clean enough publish context.

green_contract.title: Dashboard V7 Green Contract
items: Single Writer: pipeline-master ist der einzige residente Writer für autoritative Latest-Artefakte.
Full-Universe-Audit beweist Artefaktvollständigkeit getrennt von Live-Canaries.
Hist-Probs no-data / insufficient-history / inactive gelten neutral und nicht als fehlende UI-Wahrheit.
Fundamentals bleiben Warning-only im priorisierten Scope und nie Final-Seal-Blocker.
Q1/Market-Data dürfen dem Release-Target voraus sein; nur Rückstand ist kritisch.

runtime_preflight.next_fix: Stabilize the local/NAS Pages runtime first, then rerun publish and UI truth from the same target-date chain.

summary.message: Diagnostic snapshot is not available yet
Diagnostic snapshot is not available yet

ui_field_truth_report.label: UI Field Truth Report
ui_field_truth_report.next_fix: Start the local runtime, rebuild the UI field truth report, and verify that only critical endpoints influence ui_field_truth_ok.

runbook.lessons_learned: Fundamentals is optional in UI truth. A fundamentals miss should be advisory only. If wrangler is offline, that is a runtime/readiness problem, not a field-truth defect in the artifacts themselves.

final_integrity_seal.label: Final Integrity Seal
final_integrity_seal.next_fix: Clear the blocking reasons upstream, then rebuild the final integrity seal from the same target-date artifact chain.

runbook.lessons_learned: Final seal is the only release SSOT. NAS reachability is advisory by default; fundamentals are non-blocking by policy. If the seal disagrees with observers, trust the seal and rebuild the observers from the same run.

build_deploy_bundle.label: Build Deploy Bundle
build_deploy_bundle.next_fix: Regenerate the deploy bundle after the final seal is green.

failure_signals: bundle target market date mismatches seal
runbook.lessons_learned: Bundle generation is downstream of the seal. If this step is red while the seal is green, treat it as publish-path drift, not a data-plane failure.

wrangler_deploy.label: Wrangler Deploy
wrangler_deploy.summary: Deploy proof missing or not release-ready
wrangler_deploy.next_fix: Run the release gate and publish step after the bundle is prepared.

failure_signals: release gate rejects dirty tree or invalid seal
runbook.lessons_learned: Deploy is the last mile, not the authority. The release gate must only accept a valid final seal and a clean enough publish context.

dependencies.reason: Provider-backed v7 history refresh is the first upstream market-data hop.
Q1 delta ingest can only advance after v7 history refresh touches newer packs.
QuantLab daily report reads raw-bar freshness from the Q1 ingest layer.
Hist-probs/regime computation requires the same raw market bars to advance.
Scientific summary is sourced from stock-analysis snapshots rather than QuantLab raw bars.
Forecast batch is independent from QuantLab raw-bar freshness.
Learning report aggregates forecast/scientific/elliott source artifacts.
Breakout/snapshot combines forecast freshness with QuantLab publish layers.
The universe-wide analyze-v4 audit is only trustworthy after the direct data/model inputs and snapshot layer are current.
ETF diagnostic explains the current snapshot funnel output.
V1 audit requires current learning artifacts and snapshot outputs.
Cutover readiness is evaluated after the V1 audit is available.
System status summarizes the current artifact/control-plane state after the direct audit artifacts exist.
Freshness report derives expected market date and family health from upstream market/history artifacts.
Epoch is the coherence view across status and pipeline outputs for the same target date.
UI truth should run only after the artifact chain has a coherent target date.
Final seal consumes the coherent epoch plus UI truth result.
Deploy bundle is only valid after the seal is ready.
Wrangler deploy is the final downstream publish step.

root_causes.title: Data freshness report shows stale families
root_causes.why: Prioritized fundamentals scope: fresh=81, stale=0, missing=1189.
root_causes.fix: Rebuild the freshness report after upstream market, hist-probs, and fundamentals artifacts are current.

root_causes.title: Final seal is blocking release
root_causes.fix: Clear the blocking reasons upstream, then rebuild the final integrity seal from the same target-date artifact chain.

root_causes.title: Automation refresh chain is degraded
root_causes.impact: Automation can report failure even when some artifacts recovered, so operators need explicit cause-vs-recovery visibility.
root_causes.fix: Use the latest successful artifact and latest failed automation step together; only treat unrecovered failures as active blockers.

market_data_refresh.label: Market Data Refresh
market_data_refresh.why: Latest v7 history refresh report was generated at 2026-04-18T08:02:30Z with observed market data only up to 2026-04-17.
market_data_refresh.next_fix: Run the provider-backed history refresh first; if it does not advance, inspect provider auth/quota and refresh report outputs before touching downstream jobs.

status_detail.impact: No newer market history can flow into delta ingest, QuantLab raw bars, hist-probs, or the snapshot dependency chain.

failure_signals: output_asof missing or older than the latest trading day
assets_fetched_with_data = 0 with output_asof null (pre-market run or quota exhaustion — re-run after market close)
runbook.lessons_learned: Runs during market hours return partial data (EODHD day not yet closed). Schedule at ≥23:00 ET. assets_fetched_with_data=0 before market close is normal — not an error. API_LIMIT_REACHED.lock.json means quota exhausted; wait for reset or swap API key.

q1_delta_ingest.label: Q1 Delta Ingest
q1_delta_ingest.why: Latest successful Q1 delta ingest is anchored to ingest_date=2026-04-17 and was updated at 2026-04-18T14:34:06Z.
q1_delta_ingest.next_fix: Rerun the Q1 delta ingest against the active target_market_date, then verify latest_success.json records ingest_date, selected_packs_total, noop_no_changed_packs, and a downstream QuantLab rebuild before rebuilding snapshot/UI layers.

status_detail.impact: QuantLab raw-bar freshness cannot advance until the delta ingest layer has incorporated newer market history.

runbook.lessons_learned: Noop detection is intentional — if no packs changed, ingest skips and downstream QuantLab continues on the same partitions. Only re-run if upstream refresh has actually advanced. evidence_complete=false means the artifact is incomplete and cannot be trusted for release decisions.

quantlab_daily_report.label: QuantLab Daily Report
quantlab_daily_report.next_fix: Advance canonical raw part files first, then rebuild snapshot/feature-store/report so a fresh render timestamp cannot mask stale QuantLab data.

status_detail.impact: QuantLab canonical data is within expected label window (lag=0T ≤ 20T).

failure_signals: raw canonical or publish as-of lags current market
runbook.lessons_learned: latestCanonicalRequiredDataDate lags latestAnyRequiredDataDate by the ML label window — structural, not a bug. Only excess lag beyond the window is a violation. Report freshness reflects publish asof, not raw-bar asof. latestCanonicalRequiredDataDate was 33 days stale (2026-03-11) due to missing auto-update — monitor this field.

hist_probs.label: Historical Probabilities
hist_probs.why: US+EU historical profile freshness is 28041/28041 fresh, 0 stale, 0 missing; latest run asset classes=ETF,STOCK.
hist_probs.next_fix: Run the full historical-profile builder over the registry-backed stock+ETF universe, then verify run-summary coverage and regime date advance together.

status_detail.impact: Historical probability context is current for the required US+EU universe.

failure_signals: run-summary processed count below universe target
ETF tickers not included in asset_classes
runbook.lessons_learned: 45–90 min for full 42k universe. Always include --asset-classes STOCK,ETF — ETFs are silently omitted if flag is missing. INACTIVE_TOLERANCE=20 trading days (was 5, now fixed). Write-verification added after each file write. fresh_skipped checkpoint enables crash recovery and idempotency. 16,755 assets (39.7%) were stale as of 2026-04-10 — run catch-up before marking release ready.

forecast_daily.label: Forecast Daily
forecast_daily.why: Forecast latest artifact was generated at 2026-04-17T20:15:46.194Z with as-of 2026-04-17.
forecast_daily.next_fix: Use scripts/forecast/run_daily.mjs as the primary batch health check and treat engine-level files as implementation detail unless run_daily fails.

status_detail.impact: Forecast freshness drives learning and the snapshot stack, but current forecast artifacts are healthy.

runbook.lessons_learned: Silent quality degradation when quantlab_daily_report is stale. Always verify data_asof alignment between forecast output and quantlab canonical date before treating forecast as fresh. A data_asof gap > 2 trading days indicates an upstream stale source, not a forecast engine bug.

scientific_summary.label: Scientific Summary
scientific_summary.next_fix: Refresh the scientific summary and verify the upstream source emits a current timestamp before the daily learning batch runs.

status_detail.impact: Scientific rows remain available, but they are not current enough to be treated as live input.

failure_signals: no signals and no source timestamp
runbook.lessons_learned: source_meta.asof must equal or exceed the QuantLab canonical date. An empty signals array with a fresh asof is valid (regime with no strong setups). An empty signals array with a stale asof means upstream ingest has not advanced.

learning_daily.label: Daily Learning Report
learning_daily.why: Learning report generated 2026-04-19T07:05:49.445Z with status VERBESSERUNG ✅.
learning_daily.next_fix: Regenerate the daily learning report after forecast/scientific artifacts are current enough to support it.

status_detail.impact: The learning report drives readiness and audit interpretation across the dashboard.

runbook.lessons_learned: Learning cycle is a downstream observer of forecast and scientific summary — it will not advance if either source is stale. safety_switch escalation is intentional when model accuracy drops; do not manually override. overall_status=DEGRADED with safety_switch=ACTIVE means the system is protecting live signal quality.

snapshot.label: Best Setups Snapshot
snapshot.next_fix: Keep snapshot generation tied to explicit upstream freshness checks so QuantLab staleness cannot hide behind a fresh render timestamp.

status_detail.impact: Snapshot rows currently render, but part of the dependency chain still lags.

runbook.lessons_learned: rows_emitted.total=0 almost always means quantlab_asof lags data_asof by more than the tolerated window. ETF count drops silently when ETF hist-probs run was omitted. diagnose-best-setups-etf-drop.mjs is the diagnostic tool — run it before re-running build-best-setups-v4. CRITICAL: Snapshot must run AFTER hist-probs is fresh. Assets with minimum_n_not_met=true and stale hist-probs are now gated out of BUY lists at row level.

stock_analyzer_universe_audit.label: Stock Analyzer Universe Audit
stock_analyzer_universe_audit.summary: Stock Analyzer universe audit found critical field-level failures
stock_analyzer_universe_audit.why: Latest audit processed 41785/41785 assets and found 1 failure families (0 critical, 1 warning) affecting 1189 assets.

failure_families.label: Fundamentals artifact missing
failure_families.description: The fundamentals artifact is missing for a stock asset that should expose fundamentals in the UI.

warning_failure_families.label: Fundamentals artifact missing
warning_failure_families.description: The fundamentals artifact is missing for a stock asset that should expose fundamentals in the UI.

status_detail.impact: This is the only universe-wide proof that analyze-v4 renders all required UI contracts correctly across stocks and ETFs.

runbook.lessons_learned: Full audit (--max-tickers 0) takes 60-90 min for 42k assets. artifact_only mode runs without wrangler and is the default for automated pipelines. artifact_hist_probs_stale is the most common critical family; run hist-probs catch-up first. sampled_mode=true means the audit result can never qualify as release_eligible.

etf_diagnostic.label: ETF Diagnostic
etf_diagnostic.why: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.
etf_diagnostic.next_fix: If ETF snapshot output drops to zero again, inspect diagnostic rejection breakdown before changing gates.

diagnosis.explanation: No ETF-specific drop was detected in the inspected stages.

status_detail.impact: ETF diagnostic validates whether the current snapshot funnel is emitting final ETF rows.

failure_signals: diagnosis code indicates rejection funnel collapse
runbook.lessons_learned: ETF count in best-setups-v4 can silently drop to zero if hist-probs was run without --asset-classes STOCK,ETF. Runs fast (< 30 sec) and can be run standalone. diagnosis_code=ETF_HIST_PROBS_MISSING means ETF hist-probs artifact is absent.

v1_audit.label: V1 Audit
v1_audit.next_fix: Keep the audit path wired to current snapshot and learning artifacts so readiness decisions stay evidence-backed.

status_detail.impact: V1 audit supports cutover decisions and evidence-quality reporting.

runbook.lessons_learned: V1 signals mature 5 trading days after entry. signals_today=0 with matured_signals>0 is normal (no new entries today). Persistent matured_signals=0 over multiple days indicates the signal generation pipeline has stalled upstream.

cutover_readiness.label: Cutover Readiness
cutover_readiness.next_fix: Do not override governance. Improve readiness by reducing fallback usage and clearing upstream freshness blockers.

status_detail.impact: Cutover should remain blocked until fallback-rate and readiness criteria are genuinely satisfied.

runbook.lessons_learned: Cutover is gated on 7 consecutive days of legacy_shadow_write_total=0 and legacy_artifact_read_total=0 in the production context. criteria_failed items are authoritative — do not mark cutover ready manually.

system_status_report.label: System Status Report
system_status_report.why: This report itself is the observer summary layer for the active control plane.
system_status_report.next_fix: Rebuild the status report after upstream artifacts are refreshed.

runbook.lessons_learned: System status is an observer, not the release authority. It should explain the current control-plane state, never invent it. Rebuild it only after the upstream artifacts for the same target market date exist.

data_freshness_report.label: Data Freshness Report
data_freshness_report.summary: Data freshness report shows stale families
data_freshness_report.why: Prioritized fundamentals scope: fresh=81, stale=0, missing=1189.
data_freshness_report.next_fix: Rebuild the freshness report after upstream market, hist-probs, and fundamentals artifacts are current.

failure_signals: fundamentals_scope stale_count or missing_count > 0 for prioritized assets
runbook.lessons_learned: Fundamentals freshness is tracked only for the prioritized scope and is warning-only by policy. Hist-probs and market-history remain blocking; fundamentals do not.

pipeline_epoch.label: Pipeline Epoch
pipeline_epoch.next_fix: Rebuild epoch only after system status/runtime artifacts share the same target market date and module run IDs are populated.

runbook.lessons_learned: A fresh epoch without module run_ids is not a valid control-plane success. It is only a timestamped shell. Module coherence matters more than file recency.

runtime_preflight.next_fix: Stabilize the local/NAS Pages runtime first, then rerun publish and UI truth from the same target-date chain.
